tasks.title: Fix desktop_web_different_ports Test Port Conflict
tasks.description: Test uses hardcoded port 3000 causing conflicts with other processes. Replace hardcoded port 3000 with dynamic port allocation using TcpListener::bind("127.0.0.1:0") to get available port.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure test passes when port 3000 is already in use by another process
AddUnitTest: verify dynamic port allocation returns a valid TCP port
AddIntegrationTest: verify desktop_web_different_ports test runs successfully in parallel with other tests
tasks.impl_notes: Use std::net::TcpListener::bind("127.0.0.1:0") to dynamically allocate an available port. Store the assigned port in a variable and use it throughout the test instead of hardcoded 3000.

tasks.title: Begin Phase 6 Release Qualification
tasks.description: Begin Phase 6 release qualification scope: end-to-end integration tests, performance benchmarking, security audit, observability validation, and documentation review. Deliverables include Phase 6 test plan document, E2E test infrastructure, benchmark results, security audit report, and observability validation report.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify all Phase 6 scopes are documented in test plan
AddIntegrationTest: verify E2E test infrastructure is operational
AddRegressionTest: ensure full test suite passes without regressions
RunTestSuite: execute cargo test --all-features --all to validate no regressions
tasks.impl_notes: Phase 6 scope encompasses: 1) E2E integration tests 2) Performance benchmarking 3) Security audit 4) Observability validation 5) Documentation review. Create a Phase 6 test plan document outlining each deliverable.

tasks.title: Fix Bedrock Test Environment Pollution
tasks.description: AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK and AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID env vars from other tests pollute this test when run with --all-features. Use temp_env pattern to isolate environment variables, or run test in separate process, or clear relevant env vars before test execution.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure test passes when run with --all-features flag
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify credential resolution works correctly with isolated environment
tasks.impl_notes: Use temp_env crate or similar pattern to set/unset environment variables within the test. Clear AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK and AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID before test and restore after.

tasks.title: Fix Trailing Whitespace in storage/src/service.rs
tasks.description: 5 lines with trailing whitespace in storage/src/service.rs:317, 340, 363, 386, 391. Run cargo fmt --all to fix formatting issues.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure cargo fmt --all -- --check passes after formatting
RunTestSuite: verify no formatting regressions in storage module
tasks.impl_notes: Run cargo fmt --all to automatically fix trailing whitespace. Verify with cargo fmt --all -- --check.

tasks.title: Deprecated mode Field Cleanup
tasks.description: Legacy mode field marked for removal in v4.0. Schedule removal for v4.0 release.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure no references to mode field break after removal
AddUnitTest: verify config parsing works without mode field
tasks.impl_notes: This is a deferred cleanup task for v4.0. Document the deprecation and schedule removal in v4.0 release notes.

tasks.title: Deprecated tools Field Cleanup
tasks.description: Legacy tools field marked for removal after migration. Schedule removal after migration complete.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure no references to tools field break after removal
AddUnitTest: verify tool registry works without legacy tools field
tasks.impl_notes: This is a deferred cleanup task. Document the deprecation and schedule removal after migration is complete.
